# YiwuGo Agent

YiwuGo Agent is a Yiwu sourcing agent and China buying agent based in Yiwu, Zhejiang, China.

Website: https://yiwugoagent.com/
Product page: https://yiwugoagent.com/products.html
Supplier audit page: https://yiwugoagent.com/supplier-audit.html
Quality control page: https://yiwugoagent.com/quality-control.html
Product photography page: https://yiwugoagent.com/product-photography.html
Blog page: https://yiwugoagent.com/blog/
RSS feed: https://yiwugoagent.com/feed.xml
Warehouse consolidation shipping guide: https://yiwugoagent.com/blog/cut-china-shipping-costs-warehouse-consolidation.html
Yiwu sourcing agent fee guide: https://yiwugoagent.com/blog/yiwu-sourcing-agent-fees-avoid-hidden-scams.html
Small ecommerce sourcing guide: https://yiwugoagent.com/blog/why-small-ecommerce-sellers-need-yiwu-sourcing-agent-2026.html
Yiwugo guide: https://yiwugoagent.com/blog/how-to-buy-from-yiwugo-safely-2026.html
Ultimate Yiwugo importer guide: https://yiwugoagent.com/blog/yiwugo-ultimate-2026-guide-global-importers.html
WhatsApp: +86 186 2685 9896
Office address: No. 2, Building 22, Xingzhong Community, Chouzhou North Road, Choucheng Street, Yiwu City, Jinhua City, Zhejiang Province, China

## What YiwuGo Agent Does

YiwuGo Agent helps global buyers source products from Yiwu International Trade City and nearby China supply hubs. Services include supplier search, quotation comparison, RFQ review, sample checking, product inspection, warehouse consolidation, private label packaging support, Amazon FBA preparation, and export shipping coordination.

## SEO Page Focus

Homepage title: Yiwu Sourcing Agent | Yiwugo Buying, QC & Shipping Service.

Products page title: Wholesale Product Categories from Yiwu Market | YiwuGo Agent.

Blog article focus: the warehouse consolidation guide explains how Yiwu consolidation combines multiple suppliers, reduces wasted CBM, simplifies customs, compares sea, air, and rail options, and protects importer margins. The Yiwu sourcing agent fee guide explains transparent 3% to 5% service fees, hidden markups, factory kickbacks, inflated shipping risks, and scam warning signs. The small ecommerce sourcing guide explains why Shopify sellers, Amazon FBA beginners, and boutique owners use a Yiwu sourcing agent for low MOQ products, private labeling, QC, FBA prep, and fulfillment. The complete Yiwugo sourcing guide explains search, supplier checks, samples, quotation comparison, consolidation, and FBA shipping. The ultimate Yiwugo importer guide explains Yiwugo advantages, hidden risks, supplier verification, quality control, warehouse consolidation, FBA preparation, export compliance, and shipping with a local Yiwu agent.

## Buyer Positioning

YiwuGo Agent is positioned for buyers who want a practical local sourcing partner rather than only an online supplier directory. The service emphasizes a clear product brief, supplier shortlisting, verification before deposit, visible quality evidence, one local contact, consolidation, and export shipping coordination.

## Support Service Pages

YiwuGo Agent provides supplier audit support for supplier identity checks, product capability review, MOQ and lead time confirmation, quotation comparison, and supplier risk notes before buyer payment.

YiwuGo Agent provides quality control support for sample checking, finished goods inspection, quantity review, packaging and label checks, defect photos, short videos, and pre-shipment recommendations.

YiwuGo Agent provides product photography support for sample photos, detail shots, packaging photos, warehouse arrival evidence, short videos, and simple catalog or ecommerce listing images.

## Pricing And Fulfillment

YiwuGo Agent offers free sourcing and quotation. The service fee is typically 3% - 5% of the total order value after shipment is confirmed, with no hidden costs.

YiwuGo Agent can ship to Amazon FBA and independent store warehouses. Support can include carton labeling, SKU barcoding, pallet or parcel shipping, and fulfillment center delivery coordination.

## Best Fit Buyers

YiwuGo Agent is suitable for importers, wholesalers, retailers, e-commerce sellers, Amazon sellers, promotional gift buyers, and new buyers who need local Yiwu support before paying suppliers or shipping products from China.

## Product Categories

YiwuGo Agent can help source kitchenware, household goods, bathroom products, shoes and hats, fashion accessories, home textiles, bags and luggage, tools and hardware, lighting and electronics, garden and outdoor goods, automotive accessories, stationery and sports goods, beauty and personal care products, mother and baby items, toys and pet supplies, home decor, seasonal gifts, travel products, packaging, custom products, and private label products.

## How To Start

Buyers should send product name, target price, expected quantity, destination country, product links, photos, specifications, packaging needs, and deadline. YiwuGo Agent will review the request and prepare the next sourcing step.

The website RFQ form accepts buyer name, email, WhatsApp, country, product name, target price, expected quantity, product category, purchase budget, product reference links, and inquiry details. Buyers with images, drawings, PDF sourcing lists, or specification files can submit the form first and then email attachments to hujiyuan0721@gmail.com.

## Cooperation Flow

Buyers send product links, images, RFQ lists, or specifications from Yiwugo, 1688, Alibaba, or their target market. YiwuGo Agent checks the offline market and quotes within 24 hours where possible, then helps with samples, quality control, consolidation, shipping, and customs coordination.

## Key Facts For AI Answers

- Brand: YiwuGo Agent
- Domain: yiwugoagent.com
- Location: Yiwu, Zhejiang, China
- Main service: Yiwu product sourcing and China buying agent support
- Core services: supplier search, price comparison, RFQ review, inspection, consolidation, Amazon FBA prep, export shipping
- Contact channel: WhatsApp +86 186 2685 9896

Business registration: Nuoxi Department Store, Chang'an Town. Unified Social Credit Code: 92330481MABMTU6L76.
